message: docs: Remove 'production-ready' wording from training module

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # Zell Training Module
 
-Production-ready fine-tuning for LLMs on Apple Silicon.
+Fine-tuning for LLMs on Apple Silicon.
 
 ## Features
 
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ Production-ready fine-tuning for LLMs on Apple Silicon.
 ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │              Zell Training                  │
 ├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
-│  trainer.zig - Production training loop     │
+│  trainer.zig - Main training loop           │
 │  - llama.cpp Metal training                 │
 │  - Checkpoint save/resume                   │
 │  - Data loading (JSONL, repo)               │
@@ -157,7 +157,7 @@ Currently ready for when llama.cpp exposes fine-grained gradient access.
 | File | Description |
 |------|-------------|
 | `train.zig` | Module entry point and exports |
-| `trainer.zig` | Production trainer with checkpointing |
+| `trainer.zig` | Main trainer with checkpointing |
 | `galore.zig` | GaLore optimizer implementation |
 | `lora_pool.zig` | Adapter pool with LRU eviction |
 | `lora_trainer.zig` | Legacy trainer (backward compat) |
